rationale: Human-chosen during grooming (overrode recommendation: Pick one transactional email provider (e.g. Postmark, Amazon SES, or Resend) behind a thin mailer abstraction, with a dedicated sending domain and SPF/DKIM configured as a v1 requirement. Magic-link + invite are the only ways into the system, so deliverability is on the critical path, not a nice-to-have.)
